    Show / Hide Table of Contents

    Struct VertexEmpty

    Represents an empty vertex attribute that can be used as an empty IVertexMaterial or empty IVertexSkinning in a Aspose.CAD.FileFormats.GLB.Geometry.VertexBuilder structure.

    Inherited Members
    ValueType.ToString()
    object.Equals(object, object)
    object.ReferenceEquals(object, object)
    object.GetType()
    Namespace: Aspose.CAD.FileFormats.GLB.Geometry.VertexTypes
    Assembly: Aspose.CAD.dll
    Syntax
    public readonly struct VertexEmpty : IVertexMaterial, IVertexSkinning, IEquatable<VertexEmpty>

    Properties

    Name Description
    MaxBindings

    Gets the Number of valid joints supported.
    Typical values are 0, 4 or 8.
    MaxColors

    Gets the number of color attributes available in this vertex
    MaxTextCoords

    Gets the number of texture coordinate attributes available in this vertex
